message:
fix: raise navbar z-index so profile dropdown escapes its stacking context (#7988)

PR #7981 raised the UserProfileDropdown menu to z-toast (500) so it would
sit above the Mission Sidebar (z-modal=400). That fix didn't take effect
because the menu is a descendant of <nav class="z-50">, and a stacking
context created by the parent caps its children — z-toast on the dropdown
menu couldn't escape the navbar's z-50 ceiling.

Raise the navbar itself to z-toast so its descendants (profile dropdown,
notifications, search suggestions) can actually sit above the mission
sidebar. The navbar is semantically a sticky header, but functionally
hosts dropdowns that must overlay modals — z-toast matches that need.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
